description: This audio contains fast paced digital drums changing the beat from halftime into a four on the floor with a kick on every beat along with a synth bassline. Other synth sounds are playing a lead sound and an arpeggiolike melody along with a distorted e-guitar. A female voice is singing in a high pitch accompanied by another female backing voice creating a harmony. This song may be playing as an entry for a fast paced action series.
accompaniment: digital drums, synth bassline, distorted e-guitar
tempo_and_rhythm: fast paced, four on the floor
